course.title: 3D Data Visualization with Alien Monitor
course.tagline: Probe alien-monitor API health, topology, and LUMEN reputation — then map oracle scenes to R3F.

m1.title: Monitor health & modes
m1.concept: Probe /api/health and understand TEST vs REAL vs UNIVERSE modes.

m2.title: Topology graph model
m2.concept: Parse nodes + links from /api/topology into typed graph structures.

m3.title: Federation reputation
m3.concept: Enrich the trust graph with /api/reputation/peers from the Hub.

m4.title: LUMEN PageRank scores
m4.concept: Call /api/reputation/lumen and bind scores to graph nodes.

m5.title: R3F oracle scene mapping
m5.concept: Map oracle slugs to camera, accent, and primitive metadata for Three.js scenes.

site.quickstart_intro: Clone the repo, install deps, and run labs locally or in Colab.
site.certificate_intro: Complete all labs and exercises to unlock your certificate.
site.certificate_locked: Check off all labs and exercises to unlock
site.footer: Part of the AIMarket ecosystem — alien-monitor oracle scenes as a live 3D sandbox.

exercises.heading: Your turn
exercises.lab01_hint: Confirm health returns ok. Check: python labs/run_exercises.py --module m1
exercises.lab02_hint: Parse topology nodes and adjacency. Check: python labs/run_exercises.py --module m2
exercises.lab03_hint: List federation peers with trust scores. Check: python labs/run_exercises.py --module m3
exercises.lab04_hint: Bind LUMEN scores to node ids. Check: python labs/run_exercises.py --module m4
exercises.lab05_hint: Map oracle slugs to R3F scene specs. Check: python labs/run_exercises.py --module m5

lab01_health_probe.hint: Probe /api/health on live or mock monitor.

lab05_r3f_scenes.hint: Map oracle nodes to R3F camera/accent metadata.

lab01.mock_note: Using in-process mock server (alien-monitor not running).
